# Equivie MED

> Equivie MED is a Swiss women's health platform specialising in menopause and perimenopause. We provide evidence-based medical consultations via video with Swiss-certified physicians. All content is reviewed for medical accuracy and grounded in current clinical research.

## Main
- [Homepage](https://equiviemed.ch/): Overview of services — video consultations with menopause specialists, how it works, pricing, and FAQ

## Blog — Evidence-Based Menopause Guides
- [All articles](https://equiviemed.ch/blog): Index of all published guides on menopause, hormones, and women's health
- [Was ist die Perimenopause und wie erkenne ich sie?](https://equiviemed.ch/blog/was-ist-die-perimenopause): Recognising perimenopause — symptoms, timeline, when to seek medical advice
- [HRT und Brustkrebs: Was sagt die aktuelle Forschung?](https://equiviemed.ch/blog/hrt-und-brustkrebs-aktuelle-forschung): Current evidence on hormone therapy and breast cancer risk — debunking outdated fears
- [Warum Östrogen für die Knochengesundheit entscheidend ist](https://equiviemed.ch/blog/oestrogen-und-knochengesundheit): Oestrogen's role in bone health, osteoporosis prevention during menopause
- [Wechseljahre am Arbeitsplatz](https://equiviemed.ch/blog/wechseljahre-am-arbeitsplatz): How menopause affects working women and what employers can do
- [Die Abnahme von Estradot von der Spezialitätenliste](https://equiviemed.ch/blog/estradot-abnahme-spezialitaetenliste): Estradot removed from Swiss reimbursement list — what patients need to know
- [Alternativen zu Estradot](https://equiviemed.ch/blog/alternativen-zu-estradot): Alternative transdermal oestrogen options available in Switzerland
